stemHtml: An aircraft accelerates towards the transonic speed region. What happens to C<sub>LMAX</sub> and stall speed?

options.a: C<sub>LMAX</sub> will decrease and the stalling speed will increase.
options.b: C<sub>LMAX</sub> will decrease and the stalling speed will decrease.
options.c: C<sub>LMAX</sub> will increase and the stalling speed will decrease.
options.d: C<sub>LMAX</sub> will increase and the stalling speed will increase.
